prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.2 kg; Height 176.4 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.2%; 6 months ago 6.3%; 3 months ago 6.0%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 139mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 124mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.3kg; 9 months ago 61.9kg; 6 months ago 63.1kg; 3 months ago 61.2kg; current 65.2kg), Height (12 months ago 176.4cm; 9 months ago 176.4cm; 6 months ago 176.4cm; 3 months ago 176.4cm; current 176.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 18U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 350mg/g; 9 months ago 242mg/g; 6 months ago 289mg/g; 3 months ago 264mg/g; current 209mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 111mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 130mg/dL; current 120mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 9.4g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.92 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
